member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.ActionPlanner
member.summary: Produces deterministic lexical operation plans without inspecting or changing the filesystem.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.ActionPlanner.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler)
member.summary: Initializes an action planner using shared diagnostics infrastructure.
member.param: The centralized logging service.
The handler for unexpected operation failures.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.ConflictResolver
member.summary: Resolves deterministic lexical conflicts within a plan without filesystem access.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.ConflictResolver.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler)
member.summary: Initializes a conflict resolver using shared diagnostics infrastructure.
member.param: The centralized logging service.
The handler for unexpected operation failures.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.IActionPlanner
member.summary: Converts rule decisions into immutable operations without executing filesystem changes.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.IActionPlanner.PlanAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.RuleDecision},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Plans supported actions from the supplied decisions in input order.
member.param: The rule decisions to plan.
A token used to cancel planning.
member.returns: The operations, statistics, and recoverable issues.
member.exception: Thrown when the collection contains a null decision.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.IConflictResolver
member.summary: Resolves lexical conflicts within planned operations without inspecting the filesystem.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.IConflictResolver.ResolveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.PlannedOperation},OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves conflicts in supplied operation order using the requested deterministic strategy.
member.param: The planned operations to validate and resolve.
Optional conflict-resolution options.
A token used to cancel resolution.
member.returns: The accepted operations, statistics, and recoverable issues.
member.exception: Thrown when the collection contains null entries or options are invalid.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.IRuleEngine
member.summary: Evaluates configured rules against enriched file entries without executing actions.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.IRuleEngine.EvaluateAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.FileRule},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluates the supplied files against the supplied rules in deterministic input order.
member.param: The enriched entries to evaluate.
The ordered rules to validate and evaluate.
A token used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The proposed decisions and evaluation statistics.
member.exception: Thrown when an input collection is null.
Thrown when inputs or rules are invalid.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssue
member.summary: Describes one recoverable planning issue for an input decision.
member.param: The zero-based input decision position.
The supplied file path, if available.
The issue category.
A user-readable issue description.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssue.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssueKind,System.String)
member.summary: Describes one recoverable planning issue for an input decision.
member.param: The zero-based input decision position.
The supplied file path, if available.
The issue category.
A user-readable issue description.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssue.DecisionIndex
member.summary: The zero-based input decision position.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssue.FilePath
member.summary: The supplied file path, if available.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssue.Kind
member.summary: The issue category.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssue.Message
member.summary: A user-readable issue description.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssueKind
member.summary: Identifies a recoverable per-decision action-planning problem.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssueKind.InvalidDecision
member.summary: The decision does not provide valid planning input.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssueKind.MissingMetadata
member.summary: Required metadata is unavailable.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssueKind.InvalidDestinationPath
member.summary: A destination path is invalid for lexical planning.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssueKind.InvalidNameTemplate
member.summary: A rename template is invalid.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssueKind.SourceEqualsDestination
member.summary: The normalized source and destination paths are equal.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningIssueKind.UnsupportedAction
member.summary: The action kind is not supported by this planner.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics
member.summary: Contains counts produced while planning proposed actions.
member.param: The number of input decisions examined.
The number of returned operations.
The number of no-action decisions.
The number of decisions producing an issue.
The number of planned moves.
The number of planned copies.
The number of planned renames.
The number of planned deletes.
The number of returned issues.

member.summary: Contains counts produced while planning proposed actions.
member.param: The number of input decisions examined.
The number of returned operations.
The number of no-action decisions.
The number of decisions producing an issue.
The number of planned moves.
The number of planned copies.
The number of planned renames.
The number of planned deletes.
The number of returned issues.

member.summary: The number of input decisions examined.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics.OperationsPlanned
member.summary: The number of returned operations.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics.DecisionsWithNoAction
member.summary: The number of no-action decisions.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics.DecisionsFailed
member.summary: The number of decisions producing an issue.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics.MoveOperations
member.summary: The number of planned moves.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics.CopyOperations
member.summary: The number of planned copies.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics.RenameOperations
member.summary: The number of planned renames.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics.DeleteOperations
member.summary: The number of planned deletes.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanningStatistics.IssuesEncountered
member.summary: The number of returned issues.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanResult
member.summary: Contains planned operations, planning statistics, and recoverable planning issues.
member.param: Successful operations in input-decision order.
Aggregate planning counts.
Recoverable issues in input-decision order.

member.summary: Contains planned operations, planning statistics, and recoverable planning issues.

member.summary: Aggregate planning counts.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ActionPlanResult.Issues
member.summary: Recoverable issues in input-decision order.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssue
member.summary: Describes one recoverable issue for an input planned operation.
member.param: The zero-based input operation position.
The supplied operation identifier, if available.
The issue category.
A user-readable description without raw exception details.
The earlier accepted or input operation causing the issue, if applicable.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssue.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssueKind,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Describes one recoverable issue for an input planned operation.
member.param: The zero-based input operation position.
The supplied operation identifier, if available.
The issue category.
A user-readable description without raw exception details.
The earlier accepted or input operation causing the issue, if applicable.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssue.OperationIndex
member.summary: The zero-based input operation position.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssue.OperationId
member.summary: The supplied operation identifier, if available.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssue.Kind
member.summary: The issue category.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssue.Message
member.summary: A user-readable description without raw exception details.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssue.ConflictingOperationId
member.summary: The earlier accepted or input operation causing the issue, if applicable.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssueKind
member.summary: Identifies a recoverable intra-plan conflict-resolution issue.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssueKind.InvalidOperation
member.summary: The operation does not meet the required lexical contract.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssueKind.DuplicateOperationId
member.summary: The operation identifier was already used by an earlier input operation.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssueKind.DuplicateOperation
member.summary: The operation duplicates an earlier accepted operation signature.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssueKind.DestinationConflict
member.summary: The operation targets a destination already owned by an accepted operation.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionIssueKind.SourceConflict
member.summary: The operation has an unsafe source relationship with an accepted operation.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionOptions
member.summary: Configures deterministic conflict-resolution behavior.
member.param: The strategy used to resolve conflicts.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionOptions.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionStrategy)
member.summary: Configures deterministic conflict-resolution behavior.
member.param: The strategy used to resolve conflicts.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionOptions.Strategy
member.summary: The strategy used to resolve conflicts.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionOptions.Default
member.summary: Gets the default v0.1 keep-first strategy.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionResult
member.summary: Contains accepted operations, statistics, and recoverable intra-plan issues.
member.param: Accepted original operations in input order.
Aggregate conflict-resolution counts.
Recoverable issues in input order.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionStatistics
member.summary: Contains counts produced by intra-plan conflict resolution.
member.param: The number of input operations examined.
The number of returned accepted operations.
The number of operations producing an issue.
The number of accepted move operations.
The number of accepted copy operations.
The number of accepted rename operations.
The number of accepted delete operations.
The number of duplicate operation identifier issues.
The number of duplicate operation signature issues.
The number of destination conflict issues.
The number of source conflict issues.
The total number of returned issues.

member.summary: The total number of returned issues.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionStrategy
member.summary: Defines the deterministic policy used to resolve intra-plan conflicts.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.ConflictResolutionStrategy.KeepFirst
member.summary: Accepts the earliest valid operation and rejects later conflicting operations.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.FileRule
member.summary: Defines an ordered, priority-based rule evaluated against a file entry.
member.param: The case-insensitively unique rule identifier.
The human-readable rule name.
The precedence value used after matching.
The non-empty AND-combined conditions.
The proposed, non-executed action.
Whether the rule participates in evaluation.

member.summary: Represents one immutable, non-executed filesystem operation.

The source path copied from .
The planned destination path, or null for delete.
The originating selected rule identifier.

The originating selected rule priority.

The selected action or .

The selected rule priority, if any.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.RuleEvaluationStatistics
member.summary: Contains counts produced by a rule-evaluation operation.
member.param: The number of input files evaluated.
The number of files matching one or more enabled rules.
The number of files matching no enabled rule.
The total enabled rule evaluations across files.
The total successful enabled rule matches across files.

member.summary: Contains counts produced by a rule-evaluation operation.

The total successful enabled rule matches across files.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.RuleEvaluationStatistics.FilesWithMatches

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.RuleEvaluationStatistics.FilesWithoutMatches
member.summary: The number of files matching no enabled rule.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.RuleEvaluationStatistics.RulesEvaluated
member.summary: The total enabled rule evaluations across files.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Rules.Models.RuleEvaluationStatistics.RuleMatches
member.summary: The total successful enabled rule matches across files.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Rules.RuleEngine
member.summary: Performs deterministic, side-effect-free evaluation of configured file rules.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Rules.RuleEngine.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler)
member.summary: Initializes a rule engine using shared diagnostics infrastructure.
member.param: The centralized logging service.
The handler for unexpected operation failures.
